partition.description: Required values for the selected primary or secondary index partition key. Use an array in key order, an object keyed by field name, or a scalar for one-part keys.

sortPrefix.description: Optional exact tuple prefix for the selected sort key. Cannot be combined with sortStart or sortEnd.

sortStart.description: Optional inclusive sort tuple lower bound unless startExclusive is true.

sortEnd.description: Optional exclusive sort tuple upper bound unless endInclusive is true.
